titleStmt.title: SII 15.124: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 124. (B.K. No. 146 of 1926-27.) BELHŌḌ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Īśvara.
This is dated the 8th regnal year of the king, Jaya, Chaitra śu. 13, Monday, corresponding to 1174 A.D., March 18.

It registers a gift of land and oil-mill to the god Ādityadēva of Beḷupāḍi, for worship and offerings. The earlier portion of the inscription which is much damaged contains praise of the king and his officer Dhannugi-daṇḍanāyaka. This register a gift to the god Mūlasthāna to by the Śeṭṭis and other members of the trading corporation of Five Hundred on the same date. It mentions a Mahāsēnapaṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē tryeḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ kaḷacurya
cakravartti rāyamurāri sōyidēva vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
pesarvvettaṁ bhūjanaṁ rāgise sale nile vidvajjanaṁ bhītiyiṁ kaṁpisa vārastrījanaṁ vāṁcchise satkula visacchijjanaṁ kūrmmeyiṁ varṇnise tāṁ maryyā
deyiṁ vīradinatisaya savubhāgyediṁ bhāpadiṁ bhāvisalībhūcakradoḷu bijjalanamaḷa yaśaṁ cakranāthāgragaṇya . ko
ḍadinudaysidagastyaṁ kaḍalaṁ pīrddante maṁḍalēśvararājyakkoḍeyane puṭṭi bijjala naḍegoṁḍaṁ sārvvabhauma padavīśrīya .
Ā bhujabaḷacakrisuta prabhu sōyidēvanā manōje rāyamurāri yaśōbhari samaṁtu taḷedaṁ
dhareya . bahudaṁḍadoḷu bhūramaṇīmukha doḷusatyavākpāḷana ragadoḷu śrī
ge kuṁbhāgradoḷamaḷayaśōlakṣmīpati cakrādhipa sōyidēva . Ā rāyamurāri pādāṁbōruhasē
citabhramaraṁ vīrāri mathanaśauryanudāraśrī dhanyadaṁḍanāthane negaḷdaṁ nēkadānaguṇi haridēvanāyaka pit® parivāra kalpalate
tāyijagadaṁbike cari mahāsati nijagōtra negaḷdakāśyapagōtravenale satku līnateya
ṇa prastuta surarājya saukhyaṁ nijakaḷāṁbudhi laḷi yādēvi līleyoḷu . tadhairyayu
ryyaṁ kritakāryya prakaṭitā dāryanuta sauṁdaryya . va . Antu sakaḷadharmma vistāraṇā
karaṇagaḷenisida dhannugidaṁḍanāyakarvveḷuvala duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ pratiphāḷisutirpa doḷu . dharaṇītaḷado
ḷu nelasida bharatakṣētrade kuṁtaḷāvani negaḷguṁ piridumadaṟoḷa
diṁdadu divyamunīṁdradiṁda budhajanadiṁ tānadu vipravēdeghō sogayisuguṁ . Ā mahānu bhā
vana vaṁśāvatāraventeṁdoḍa . paḍedaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi diggajaṁ dēśadoḷu nilisidaṁ satkīrttiyaṁ vittamaṁ pa
budhakōṭi yoḻu nilisida
yentaṁdoḍe . ḍāmaṇiyeṁbudu gōtra śikhā maṇiyeṁbudu rāya
dēvana vasumatiyoḻu
tiḻigoḻanabjasaṁkuḷa
bhu rāyadēvanī beḷvaladēsa
damaged
mṛgapati sauryya sarasvatti nāmādi
praśasti sahitaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitarjīṇōddhārakkaṁ sthā
nadācāryarāhāradānakkaṁ śrīmatu kaḷacuryya cakravartti rāyamurāri sōvi dēva varṣada 8 neya jaya saṁvatsara caitra
su 13 sōmavāra saṁkrāntiyalu pūrvva cāryyargga
maneya nivēśaṇa
mahāsēnapaṁḍitargge dēvakāryyavaṁ pra
tipāḷisuvaru
ynūrvvaranasaṁkhyāte paṁcaśatavīrasāsanalabdhānēka guṇaṁgaḷa satya śau
ca cārucāritranayavinaya vijñāna vīrabaḻaṁju dharmapratipāḷana viśuddha guḍḍadhvaja virājitānūna sāhasāliṁ
gita viśāḻavakṣasthaḷa parākramōṁnatavāsudēvakhaṇḍaḷīmūḷabhadrōdbha varbhbhalluṁkadaṇḍahastarayyāvoḷepuravarēśvara ṣṭa śaṣṭighaṭikāsthāna
yīśvara varaprasādadvādaśa
pa samasta raṁkakāṟaruṁ
birudaruṁ bīravaṇigaruṁ bārika gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ seṭṭiyaruṁ seṭṭigutta ruṁ pramukha śrīmatu beḷupāḍi
ya śrī mūlasthānadēvarggā pratipāḷisuvaru namaśivāyaḥ . © .
svastiśrīmatkaḷacuryya cakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēvavarṣa 8 neya jaya saṁvatsarada caitra suddha 13 sōmavā
radaṁdu Ādityadēvara nivēdya naṁdādīvige khaṇḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ śrīmatu vūroḍeya rāyarasa
maṁmarasa mallikārjjunadēva dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi pūrvva nibandeyaṟuvaṇa
da matta 4 Ā kayya sīme śrī mūlasthānadēvara keyyiṁ paḍuva kammaṟageyi baḍaga ku
ṟuguṇigeyiṁda mūḍa Ā dēvariṁ paḍuvalu śrī ḍēsvarada śrī mūlasthāna dēvara sarvva namaśyada gāṇa 1 ©
śrī mūlasthānadēvarādityadēvarācāryya
Digital edition of SII 15.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
